summary: Backend testing completed for CPF/Cargo validation feature. All 15 tests passed. The mandatory CPF and Cargo validation for PDF export is working correctly.

tests: Login with valid credentials returns 200 and token

validation_behavior.without_cpf: Returns 400 with message: 'CPF é obrigatório para assinar documentos. Por favor, atualize seu perfil com o CPF.'
validation_behavior.without_cargo: Returns 400 with message: 'Cargo é obrigatório para assinar documentos. Por favor, atualize seu perfil com seu cargo.'

tests: Update user with CPF and Cargo

context_for_next_testing_agent: CPF/Cargo validation for PDF export is fully implemented and working. The validation occurs in the add_signature_to_pdf function (line ~4617 in server.py) and publicar_edicao function (line ~5077). Users must have both CPF and Cargo filled in their signature_data to export PDFs or publish DOEM editions. The admin user has been updated with CPF='123.456.789-00' and Cargo='Assessor de Planejamento'.
